'''Tola''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] officer with the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]] onboard [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']] during the [[Dark Nest Crisis]].
Tola protected [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]] when [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to dispose of a sabotaged bust of the Admiral. Later he was killed by [[Gorog]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]].

{{Char-stub}}
